sys_hub_action_type_definition.annotation: Deploy a list of one or more patches to one or more endpoints.
sys_hub_action_type_definition.description: Deploy the selected patches (by Tanium UIDs) to the selected endpoints (by serial number and/or FQDN) within the specified patch window (start and end time).

sys_hub_action_type_definition.name: (WIP) Tanium-Deploy Patches to Endpoints

sys_hub_action_input.label: Target endpoints
sys_hub_action_input.name: var__m_sys_hub_action_input_3f9a521f1bb50250a1ae117b234bcbc5

sys_hub_action_output.label: Action Status
sys_hub_action_output.name: var__m_sys_hub_action_output_3f9a521f1bb50250a1ae117b234bcbc5

sys_hub_action_output.label: Don't Treat as Error
sys_hub_action_output.name: var__m_sys_hub_action_output_3f9a521f1bb50250a1ae117b234bcbc5

sys_documentation.hint: Must be valid patches for the specified operating system (Windows or Linux)
sys_documentation.label: Patch UIDs
sys_documentation.name: var__m_sys_hub_action_input_3f9a521f1bb50250a1ae117b234bcbc5

sys_documentation.hint: A list of target endpoint FQDN and/or serial numbers
sys_documentation.label: Target endpoints
sys_documentation.name: var__m_sys_hub_action_input_3f9a521f1bb50250a1ae117b234bcbc5

sys_documentation.hint: The start time for the patch window.
sys_documentation.label: Start time
sys_documentation.name: var__m_sys_hub_action_input_3f9a521f1bb50250a1ae117b234bcbc5

sys_documentation.hint: The end time for the patch window (must be after the start time)
sys_documentation.label: End time
sys_documentation.name: var__m_sys_hub_action_input_3f9a521f1bb50250a1ae117b234bcbc5

sys_documentation.hint: Override (ignore) Tanium Patch Block Lists for this Patch deployment. Default: true.
sys_documentation.label: Override block lists
sys_documentation.name: var__m_sys_hub_action_input_3f9a521f1bb50250a1ae117b234bcbc5

sys_documentation.hint: The name to give the patch deployment within Tanium. This can be anything you want, but should be descriptive. <255 characters.
sys_documentation.label: Patch deployment name
sys_documentation.name: var__m_sys_hub_action_input_3f9a521f1bb50250a1ae117b234bcbc5

sys_documentation.hint: Override (ignore) Tanium Patch Maintenance Windows for this Patch deployment. Default: true.
sys_documentation.label: Override maintenance windows
sys_documentation.name: var__m_sys_hub_action_input_3f9a521f1bb50250a1ae117b234bcbc5

sys_documentation.hint: The description for the patch deployment within Tanium. If not specified, this will be set to the same value as the name. <1,000 characters.
sys_documentation.label: Patch deployment description
sys_documentation.name: var__m_sys_hub_action_input_3f9a521f1bb50250a1ae117b234bcbc5

sys_documentation.hint: Endpoints must be Win or Linux
sys_documentation.label: Operating system type
sys_documentation.name: var__m_sys_hub_action_input_3f9a521f1bb50250a1ae117b234bcbc5
